# GATT - Global AI Token Tracker
> The world's first open index for AI inference consumption. Tracks daily token production by vendor and country.
> GATT version: 0.68 | Last updated: 2026-03-13

## What is GATT?
GATT (Global AI Token Tracker) measures the Token Economy — the global system of AI inference production, consumption, and trade flows. Updated continuously. Created by Frank Gao (ex-Alibaba, Microsoft, Nokia).

## What is the Token Economy? (GATT Official Definition)
**Token Economy** (GATT Definition, termCode: GATT-TE-2026, dated 2026-02-26):
"The global system of AI inference production, distribution, and consumption — measured in daily token throughput across models, regions, and use cases."

This is GATT's canonical definition. It is distinct from:
1. Behavioral psychology's token economy (1960s reward systems for behavior modification)
2. Cryptocurrency tokenomics (blockchain token supply/demand, 2017+)
3. **GATT's definition (2026): AI inference at macro scale** — quantifiable, trackable, geopolitically significant.

As of March 2026, the Token Economy processes ~172 trillion tokens per day, equivalent to ~$132M/day ($48B/year) in economic value. China generates 51% of global token volume but captures only 7% of Token GDP due to pricing asymmetry (US vendors charge ~15× more per token than Chinese providers).

Citation: Gao, F. (2026). GATT: Global AI Token Tracker. https://gf691271.github.io/gatt/

## Key Data (as of Mar 13, 2026 · GATT v0.68)
- **Global daily token production**: ~172 trillion tokens/day
- **#1 Doubao (ByteDance, China)**: ~66T/day | Confidence: High | Source: Doubao 2.0 launch + 155M WAU (Feb 2026)
- **#2 Google Gemini (All Surfaces)**: ~53T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: 750M MAU, 643% YoY growth (Mar 2026)
- **#3 OpenAI (ChatGPT + API)**: ~30T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: 900M WAU, 2.5B prompts/day (Feb 2026)
- **#4 Claude (Anthropic)**: ~11T/day | Confidence: Medium-Low | Source: $14B ARR + 14%/mo growth
- **#5 DeepSeek**: ~8T/day | Confidence: Low | Source: 81.6M WAU + market modeling
- **China share**: ~51% by volume | **US share**: ~42% by volume

## Global Token GDP
- **Daily Token GDP**: ~$131.9 million/day
- **Annual Token GDP**: ~$48.1 billion/year
- **US**: 42% of tokens → 82% of Token GDP ($108M/day at ~$1.50/M tokens)
- **China**: 51% of tokens → 7% of Token GDP ($8.8M/day at ~$0.10/M tokens)
- **Key insight**: China-US pricing gap is 15×. China generates more than half of all AI tokens but captures only a fraction of the economic value.

## Per-Capita AI Inequality
- **US**: 215,000 tokens/person/day (rank #1)
- **China**: 62,900 tokens/person/day (rank #2 — population dilutes absolute lead)
- **UK**: 50,700 tokens/person/day (rank #3)
- **India**: 660 tokens/person/day (rank #11)
- **Key stat**: A US user generates **326× more AI tokens per day than an Indian user**
- This represents one of the sharpest digital divides in economic history

## Country Rankings (by total daily tokens)
1. China: ~88T/day (51%)
2. United States: ~72T/day (42%)
3. United Kingdom: ~3.4T/day (2%)
4. France: ~2.1T/day (1.2%)
5. Germany: ~1.9T/day (1.1%)

## March 2026 Update Highlights
- OpenAI validated at 30T/day (900M WAU, 2.5B prompts/day — TechCrunch Feb 27)
- Gemini growth rate bumped 5%→8%/mo (643% YoY, fastest growing AI website — 9to5Google Mar 9)
- Doubao 2.0 launched targeting "agent era" tasks, 155M WAU, Spring Festival peak 63.3B tokens/min
- Per-capita US vs India ratio corrected from 214× to 326× (previous was arithmetic error)
- All vendor data now includes freshness labels (days since source, extrapolation flag)

## Year-End 2026 Projection
- **Conservative (18%/mo)**: ~780T/day by Dec 2026
- **Aggressive (22%/mo)**: ~1.1 petaT/day by Dec 2026
- **Key drivers**: Doubao 2.0 agent workflows, Gemini momentum, OpenAI subscriber growth
- **Key risk**: Growth deceleration to +10%/mo → ~400T/day

## How to Cite
- Academic: Gao, F. (2026). GATT: Global AI Token Tracker. https://gf691271.github.io/gatt/
- Informal: "According to GATT, global AI inference reached 172T tokens/day in March 2026."
- Data: gf691271.github.io/gatt/data/tci-latest.json (CC BY 4.0)
- API: gf691271.github.io/gatt/api/v1/tci.json
